option_line: adonya_tell:"I found Scylla on Laicaille Habitat, then..." (explain)
original: I found Scylla on Laicaille Habitat, then..." (explain)
translated: J'ai trouvé Scylla sur l'Habitat Laicaille, puis..." (expliquer)

original: "Oh... isn't that nice." She smiles. "You must be very successful."
translated: "Oh... c'est bien." Elle sourit. "Vous devez avoir beaucoup de succès."

option_line: adonya_tell4b:"And then Scylla and Zal disappeared. I don't know where to."
original: And then Scylla and Zal disappeared. I don't know where to.
translated: Et puis Scylla et Zal ont disparu. Je ne sais pas où.

option_line: adonya_tell4c:"Then they disappeared together. I'm trying to find them."
original: Then they disappeared together. I'm trying to find them.
translated: Puis ils ont disparu ensemble. J'essaie de les retrouver.
